title: rubus menkei subsp. spinulatus
intro: Rubus menkei subsp. spinulatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus menkei subsp. spinulatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as potentially exhibiting antibacterial and antifungal properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Himalayan region.
